posts.author: Bhashit_Parikh
posts.text: Projections for FY2029E from my team’s internal research document: image 1380×1384 108 KB We tried to play around with some variations on what kind revenue growth and PAT margins can the company get by FY2029E. I know management has missed PAT margin guidance a few times (by some extent), but the trajectory is very clear. And we’re also trying to keep the numbers a bit conservative in our projections. Looking forward to the wise folks here poking holes in them. [Disc: invested and biased, recently increased allocation during March, not investment advice, no buy/sell recommendation]
